Subject: Revised LTV norms for housing loans
Key_Changes: LTV cap for loans above 75L reduced from 80% to 75%. EWS/LIG LTV maintained at 90%.
Remarks: System changes done. Policy manual update pending.

Subject: Updated refinance guidelines for HFCs
Key_Changes: New refinance eligibility criteria. Individual loan cap for refinance raised to 35L.
Remarks: Refinance claims filed under new norms.

Subject: Digital lending guidelines — KYC updates
Key_Changes: Video KYC allowed for loans up to 50L. eKYC mandatory for all digital originations.
Remarks: Video KYC pilot live in 5 branches. Full rollout planned.

Subject: Risk weight changes for housing loans
Key_Changes: Risk weight for housing loans LTV 75-80% increased from 35% to 50%.
Remarks: Capital adequacy impact being calculated. Board paper prepared.

Subject: Customer communication post merger
Key_Changes: All customer-facing documents must carry updated entity name and merger disclaimer.
Remarks: Templates updated. Legacy documents being phased out.

Subject: Mandatory home loan insurance disclosure
Key_Changes: Insurance premium and coverage details must be disclosed at sanction stage. Cannot be bundled.
Remarks: Sanction letter template updated with insurance disclosure section.

Subject: Capital adequacy requirements for HFCs post-merger
Key_Changes: Minimum CRAR for merged entity raised to 15%. Tier-1 capital floor at 10%.
Remarks: Capital planning exercise underway. Board approval for Tier-2 issuance obtained.

Subject: Income recognition and asset classification norms update
Key_Changes: NPA recognition timeline reduced from 90 to 60 days for loans above 2 Cr. Provisioning norms tightened.
Remarks: System changes completed. Provisioning impact of 45 Cr absorbed in Q3 FY25.

Subject: Fair lending practice code revision
Key_Changes: Mandatory cooling-off period of 3 days for all housing loans. Enhanced disclosure at pre-sanction stage.
Remarks: Process and templates updated. Training completed across all branches.

Subject: Outsourcing guidelines for financial services
Key_Changes: Mandatory due diligence framework for all outsourced activities. Board-approved outsourcing policy required.
Remarks: Policy approved. Vendor due diligence for critical vendors done. Remaining vendors in progress.

Subject: Stress testing framework for housing finance companies
Key_Changes: Quarterly stress testing mandatory. Scenarios to include interest rate shock of 300 bps and property price decline of 20%.
Remarks: Stress testing framework operationalized. Results presented to Board quarterly.

Subject: Data localization requirements for financial data
Key_Changes: All customer financial data to be stored within India. Cloud service providers must have India-based servers.
Remarks: Migration from Singapore DR site to Mumbai underway. 60% data migrated.

Subject: Mandatory CERSAI registration within 30 days
Key_Changes: Security interest registration on CERSAI portal mandatory within 30 days of creation. Penalty for delay.
Remarks: Auto-registration integrated with LOS. 98% compliance achieved.

Subject: Interest rate benchmarking — EBLR transition
Key_Changes: All floating rate housing loans must be linked to external benchmark. Legacy MCLR loans to offer switch option.
Remarks: New loans on EBLR. Legacy migration campaign for 12000 MCLR accounts launched. 45% migrated.

Subject: PMAY-U scheme extension and revised income limits
Key_Changes: PMAY-U extended to March 2026. EWS income limit raised to 3.5L. LIG limit raised to 7L.
Remarks: System parameters updated. Marketing collateral refreshed. DSA training completed.

Subject: Mandatory escrow monitoring for builder loans
Key_Changes: 70% of buyer funds must remain in RERA escrow. Lender to verify escrow compliance before each disbursement.
Remarks: Escrow verification added to disbursement checklist. API integration with RERA portal pending.

Subject: TDS on property transactions above 50L
Key_Changes: TDS rate revised to 1% for property value above 50L. Buyer to deduct and deposit before registration.
Remarks: System updated to auto-calculate and track TDS compliance for property transactions.

Subject: Customer grievance redressal framework enhancement
Key_Changes: Internal ombudsman appointment mandatory. TAT for complaint resolution reduced from 30 to 21 days.
Remarks: Internal ombudsman appointed. System TAT changes in progress. Staff training ongoing.

Subject: Co-lending model guidelines for HFCs
Key_Changes: Minimum HFC retention of 20% in co-lending arrangement. Joint credit appraisal mandatory for loans above 25L.
Remarks: Co-lending partner discussions ongoing with SBI and BoB. Model agreement under legal review.

Subject: Cyber security framework for urban cooperative banks and HFCs
Key_Changes: CISO appointment mandatory. Quarterly VAPT. SOC operations 24x7. Incident reporting within 6 hours.
Remarks: CISO appointed. SOC operational. VAPT calendar in place. Incident response playbook tested.

Subject: Corporate governance norms for large HFCs
Key_Changes: Independent director to chair audit committee. Risk committee to meet quarterly. Board evaluation annually.
Remarks: Board reconstituted. Committee charters updated. First annual evaluation completed.

Subject: Personal insolvency resolution process for housing loans
Key_Changes: Fresh insolvency application process for individual borrowers. 120-day resolution period. Moratorium provisions.
Remarks: Legal team trained. IRP empanelment done. 3 cases filed under new framework.

Subject: Recovery agent conduct guidelines revision
Key_Changes: Recovery agent visits restricted to 8am-7pm. No contact with third parties. Mandatory ID display and audio recording.
Remarks: Agent training underway. Audio recording equipment being procured. ID cards being issued.

Subject: Provisioning requirements for restructured housing loans
Key_Changes: Incremental provisioning of 10% for restructured loans. Upgrade to standard only after 12 months of satisfactory performance.
Remarks: Portfolio analysis shows 850 Cr restructured book. Provisioning impact of 85 Cr being budgeted.

Subject: Credit bureau reporting standards update
Key_Changes: Monthly reporting to all 4 credit bureaus mandatory. Dispute resolution within 21 days. Historical data correction framework.
Remarks: Reporting to CIBIL and Experian automated. Equifax and CRIF integration in progress.

Subject: Green bond framework for housing finance
Key_Changes: Green housing loan criteria defined. Reporting framework for use of proceeds. External review mandatory.
Remarks: Board discussion scheduled for Q4 FY25. Green loan identification criteria being developed.

Subject: Business continuity management guidelines
Key_Changes: Mandatory BCP testing twice annually. DR site activation within 4 hours. Critical systems RTO of 2 hours.
Remarks: BCP tested in Oct 2024. DR drill successful. All critical systems within RTO. Report submitted to Board.

Subject: Group insurance scheme for housing loan borrowers
Key_Changes: Standardized group insurance product for housing loan borrowers. Premium transparency. Portability provisions.
Remarks: RFP issued to 5 insurers. Product comparison matrix prepared. Board approval for selected insurer pending.

Subject: Liquidity coverage ratio requirements for HFCs
Key_Changes: Minimum LCR of 60% from April 2025 rising to 100% by March 2027. HQLA classification updated.
Remarks: Current LCR at 72%. Surplus SLR securities being earmarked. Monthly monitoring dashboard live.

Subject: Digital lending app guidelines
Key_Changes: All digital lending to happen through lender's own app. No third-party data access. Customer consent architecture mandatory.
Remarks: HDFC Home Loans app updated. Third-party integrations audited and compliant. Consent layer deployed.

Subject: Credit guarantee scheme for affordable housing
Key_Changes: Government guarantee for loans up to 25L in EWS/LIG segment. Premium sharing between lender and government.
Remarks: Scheme operational guidelines received. System parameters being configured. DSA training planned.

Subject: KYC periodic update simplified framework
Key_Changes: Self-declaration allowed for low-risk customers. Digital KYC update via app. Re-KYC period extended to 10 years for low-risk.
Remarks: Digital KYC update feature live on app. Customer communication for self-declaration sent.

Subject: Quarterly project progress reporting by builders
Key_Changes: Builders to submit quarterly construction progress. RERA to publish completion percentage. Lender disbursement linked to RERA progress.
Remarks: Manual RERA progress check added. API integration with Karnataka RERA portal in progress.

Subject: Concentration risk norms for HFC lending
Key_Changes: Single builder exposure capped at 15% of networth. Geographic concentration limit of 30% in any single state.
Remarks: Current exposures being mapped. 2 builder exposures exceed limit. Reduction plan prepared for Board approval.

Subject: Guidelines on digital fraud prevention
Key_Changes: Mandatory cooling period for first-time digital transactions. Transaction velocity controls. AI-based fraud detection mandatory.
Remarks: Technology vendor evaluation in progress. Budget approval for AI fraud detection tool obtained.

Subject: Changes in capital gains tax on property
Key_Changes: Indexation benefit removed for property held over 2 years. Flat 12.5% LTCG. Impact on customer refinancing decisions.
Remarks: Customer advisory issued. Prepayment analysis tool updated. Tax impact calculator added to app.

Subject: Penal charges on loan accounts framework
Key_Changes: Penal charges cannot be capitalized. Must be separate from interest. Transparent communication of charges mandatory.
Remarks: Penal charge policy revised. System changes done. Customer communication templates updated.

Subject: AIF investment in housing finance companies
Key_Changes: Enhanced disclosure for AIF investments in HFC debt instruments. Credit enhancement norms for securitized pools.
Remarks: Impact assessment being conducted. Legal opinion sought on existing AIF arrangements.

Subject: Asset liability management guidelines revision
Key_Changes: Quarterly ALM reporting. Cumulative mismatch limits tightened. Interest rate sensitivity analysis mandatory.
Remarks: ALM reporting automated. Mismatch within limits. Board ALM committee meets monthly.

Subject: Guidelines on managing risks in outsourced financial services
Key_Changes: Risk assessment of all outsourced activities. Exit strategy for each vendor. Annual Board review of outsourcing arrangements.
Remarks: Risk assessment done for 35 of 52 vendors. Exit strategy templates being prepared.

Subject: Enhanced CERSAI search requirements before loan sanction
Key_Changes: Mandatory CERSAI search before every loan sanction. Search report to be part of credit file. Auto-search integration encouraged.
Remarks: CERSAI auto-search integrated with LOS. Report auto-attached to credit file. 100% compliance.

Subject: Interest subvention scheme for women borrowers
Key_Changes: 2% interest subvention for women borrowers in affordable housing segment for loans up to 30L.
Remarks: Scheme parameters configured. 450 eligible accounts identified. Subvention claims filed with NHB.

Subject: Scale-based regulation for HFCs — Layer 3 requirements
Key_Changes: Enhanced governance requirements for Layer 3 HFCs. CRO with Board reporting. Compliance function independence mandatory.
Remarks: CRO reporting line changed to Board. Compliance function restructuring underway. Gap analysis completed.

Subject: Revised norms for housing loan prepayment and foreclosure
Key_Changes: Zero prepayment/foreclosure charge for all individual floating rate loans. Fixed rate loans: max 2% in first 3 years.
Remarks: System changes for floating rate done. Fixed rate penalty logic being updated. Customer communication drafted.

Subject: Tamil Nadu RERA — Project registration renewal requirements
Key_Changes: Annual renewal of RERA registration. Lapsed registration makes project illegal. Lender to verify renewal before disbursement.
Remarks: Verification checklist updated. Auto-alert for RERA expiry 60 days before lapse. 12 projects flagged for renewal check.

Subject: Connected lending and group exposure norms
Key_Changes: Single group exposure limit reduced to 25% of Tier-1 capital. Connected lending to be reported to Board quarterly.
Remarks: Group exposure mapping underway. 1 group identified near limit. Exposure reduction plan being implemented.

Subject: SARFAESI Act amendments for HFC recovery
Key_Changes: Minimum loan threshold for SARFAESI action reduced to 10L for HFCs. Time-bound possession process of 60 days.
Remarks: SARFAESI process updated. 45 additional cases now eligible. Legal team trained on amended provisions.

Subject: Responsible AI framework for lending decisions
Key_Changes: AI/ML models used in credit decisions must be explainable. Fairness audit annually. Customer right to human review.
Remarks: AI model inventory being prepared. Vendor evaluation for explainability tools started. Board AI governance policy drafted.

Subject: Housing loan classification and reporting standards
Key_Changes: Revised classification of housing loans for priority sector. Affordable housing defined as loans up to 35L in metros.
Remarks: Loan classification engine updated. Priority sector reporting aligned with new definition. NHB refinance claims recalculated.

Subject: Minimum net owned fund requirements for HFCs
Key_Changes: Minimum NOF increased to 25 Cr for existing HFCs. 100 Cr for new registrations. Phase-wise compliance timeline.
Remarks: NOF well above threshold at 4200 Cr post-merger. Compliance certified in Board resolution.

Subject: Guidelines on climate risk assessment for lending portfolios
Key_Changes: Climate risk stress testing mandatory from FY26. Green taxonomy for housing loans. Portfolio-level carbon footprint assessment.
Remarks: Climate risk team being constituted. External consultant engagement approved. Data collection framework being designed.

Subject: Securitization of housing loans — revised framework
Key_Changes: Minimum holding period reduced to 6 months. Minimum retention of 10%. Pool selection criteria standardized.
Remarks: Deferred to FY26 due to merger-related priorities. Impact analysis completed. Board presentation scheduled for Q1 FY26.
